title: Ibrahim b. Hisham Leads the Pilgrimage
description: Ibrih-un b. Hisham b. Ismail" led the pilgrimage this year while al-Nasri's was governor of al-Madinah. According to al-Wagidi Ibrahim b. Muhammad b. Shurahbilhis father: Ibrahim b. Hisham b. Ismail, while leading the pilgrimage, sent a messenger to 'Ata' b. Abi Rabah19 to ask when he should give his sermon at Mecca. 'Ata' answered, "After the noon worship a day before the watering. i20 But Ibrahim then gave the sermon before noon, saying that his messenger had brought Akhbar al-Dawlah, 183; Sharon, Black Banners, 134. t2. The mawla of the Hamden.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
